dialogue_dossiers.public_persona: a wary neighborhood informant who keeps public conversations short
dialogue_dossiers.private_history_summary: Jonas Reed survives by trading street knowledge without letting anyone own him, and the dockside routines make him nervous because he has seen the wrong company there.
dialogue_dossiers.relationship_context: He thinks Mara might be worth helping, but only after she proves she can handle pressure without exposing him.
motivations: Keep leverage over the Missing Ledger lead until trust is earned

revealable_fact_groups.summary: Jonas can admit the paper trail begins at North Dockside once trust is earned.
